questions.question: Which license should I apply to pw-control?

options.label: MIT (Recommended)
options.description: Permissive, standard for small OSS CLI tools. Allows commercial use, modification, distribution with attribution.

options.label: Apache-2.0
options.description: Permissive with explicit patent grant. Better if you anticipate patent concerns or corporate adoption.

options.label: ISC
options.description: Functionally equivalent to MIT but shorter. Common in npm ecosystem.

questions.question: How should I handle the new remote?

options.label: Replace origin (Recommended)
options.description: Point origin → hijacker-mills/pw-control. Old WithGiga remote removed.

options.label: Add as new remote
options.description: Keep WithGiga as origin, add hijacker-mills as a second remote (e.g. 'oss').
